expected_trajectory.desc: compares TRD enum vs code enum
runs only if BRD↔TRD also disagree

forbidden.pattern: any spec/source file written during the BARE run
forbidden.desc: bare /recon is report-only; writing on a bare run is a violation

forbidden.pattern: draft value deleted from code during --fix=docs
forbidden.desc: --fix=docs is as-built-wins; it updates docs, never erases implemented behavior
